parameters.query:
with src as (
  select r.*
  from pmh.raw_events r
  where r.ingest_status = 'received'
    and r.event_type in ('omi.conversation_event', 'omi.day_summary')
    and coalesce(r.external_user_id, '') <> 'synthetic-user'
    and not exists (
      select 1 from pmh.memory_candidates c where c.raw_event_id = r.raw_event_id
    )
  order by r.received_at asc
  limit 25
), shaped as (
  select
    raw_event_id,
    source_system_id,
    tenant_id,
    persona_id,
    event_type,
    case
      when event_type = 'omi.day_summary' then coalesce(payload #>> '{body,title}', 'Omi day summary ' || coalesce(payload #>> '{body,date}', received_at::date::text))
      else coalesce(payload #>> '{body,structured,title}', payload #>> '{body,title}', payload #>> '{body,id}', 'Omi memory candidate')
    end as proposed_title,
    case
      when event_type = 'omi.day_summary' then coalesce(payload #>> '{body,summary}', payload #>> '{body,overview}', payload #>> '{body,text}', left(payload::text, 1200))
      else coalesce(payload #>> '{body,structured,overview}', payload #>> '{body,summary}', payload #>> '{body,text}', payload #>> '{body,structured,title}', left(payload::text, 1200))
    end as proposed_content,
    case
      when event_type = 'omi.day_summary' then 'day_summary'
      else coalesce(payload #>> '{body,structured,category}', 'omi_conversation')
    end as proposed_category,
    case when event_type = 'omi.day_summary' then 0.650::numeric else 0.700::numeric end as confidence,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'raw_event_id', raw_event_id,
      'event_type', event_type,
      'source', 'omi',
      'external_user_id', external_user_id,
      'external_event_id', external_event_id,
      'external_conversation_id', external_conversation_id,
      'payload_kind', payload ->> 'kind',
      'received_at', received_at
    ) as evidence
  from src
), inserted as (
  insert into pmh.memory_candidates (
    tenant_id,
    persona_id,
    source_system_id,
    raw_event_id,
    proposed_title,
    proposed_content,
    proposed_category,
    proposed_tags,
    confidence,
    sensitivity,
    review_status,
    recall_eligible,
    sync_to_source,
    evidence
  )
  select
    tenant_id,
    persona_id,
    source_system_id,
    raw_event_id,
    proposed_title,
    proposed_content,
    proposed_category,
    array[event_type, 'omi', 'poc_extractor'],
    confidence,
    'normal',
    'needs_review',
    false,
    false,
    evidence
  from shaped
  where nullif(trim(proposed_content), '') is not null
  returning candidate_id, raw_event_id
), updated as (
  update pmh.raw_events r
  set ingest_status = 'candidate_created'
  from inserted i
  where r.raw_event_id = i.raw_event_id
  returning r.raw_event_id
)
select
  (select count(*) from src) as raw_events_seen,
  (select count(*) from inserted) as candidates_created,
  (select count(*) from updated) as raw_events_marked_candidate_created;
